transcript: Yeah, wanna meet up with my fuckin' whip?

So, you want to do it? Or am I gonna have to come and shake it outta ya?
Ohh, should I come by, or what?
Am I gonna have to shake you down, or what? How's that sound?
Shit. '[beep]' You might have to die if you tried that.

What do you want, man? I'm busy!
I'm gonna have to smack you. How's that sound?
I'm busy. You can't smack me around, 'cause I'll kill you.
You wanna meet up with my whip?
I'll kill the whip. I'll kill 'em all. Wouldn't come close. You hear me, I'm talking. Shit.
I don't know anybody with snakes in their throat.
Yeah, just fucking cleaned my house, about to lift some weights.
Ah, really? [beep] You need me to show... show ya, you want me to come over so you can learn at the feet of the master?
Shit, why you dream so much, dude? [laughing]
'Cause the reality of, the fact '[beep]' of the matter, and the reality of the matter is... that I'd crush your skull. With one punch. One punch.
Yeah, you meet up wi' my stick.
One punch will crush you. I'd crush your chest. '[beep]' Ribs.

Put a hole right through your body, bud, you don't know. If all you're gonna talk is a stick and a whip, which [laugh] is totally irrelevant to anything. [laugh] I'll just have to let you go talk about whips, huh?
You don't play for no band, dude. No, you don't.
What the fuck is that? See, you couldn't even think of a name, so you had to make one up.
You don't play no strings, dude.
You never heard of a band, you don't know any bands in Denver.
Oh, you know I live in Denver.
I don't like punks, man. I don't like 'em. '[beep]' They bother me.
I guarantee you could bring a log, you could bring a fucking pipe...'cause, [laugh] 'cause, all you do is talk shit. You don't play in a band.
